events.text: Caleb Yirenkyi (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Benjamin Asare replaces Lawrence Ati Zigi because of an injury.
Substitution, Ghana. Brandon Thomas-Asante replaces Kamaldeen Sulemana.
Substitution, Ghana. Abdul Fatawu replaces Ernest Nuamah.
Substitution, Panama. José Fajardo replaces Cecilio Waterman.
Substitution, Panama. Azarías Londoño replaces Cristian Martínez.
César Blackman (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Panama. Ismael Díaz replaces José Luis Rodríguez.
Substitution, Ghana. Kwasi Sibo replaces Elisha Owusu.
Substitution, Ghana. Prince Adu replaces Jordan Ayew.
Substitution, Panama. Aníbal Godoy replaces César Blackman.
Goal! Ghana 1, Panama 0. Caleb Yirenkyi (Ghana) right footed shot from very close range to the top right corner following a fast break.
Carlos Harvey (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
